title: gardenia propinqua
intro: Gardenia propinqua, also known as the Queensland gardenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine in Australia and Asia for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The extracts and oils from Gardenia propinqua have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Gardenia propinqua are often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
